name: Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
2. Combine dry ingredients in a large bowl.
3. Cut in the butter using a pastry blender until the dough resembles coarse crumbs.
4. Stir in the milk, egg, and raisins. Mix until well blended.
5. Turn off the heat source.
6. On a floured pastry cloth, knead the dough 30 seconds.
7. Roll the dough to a thickness of about 1/2 inch (2.5 cm).
8. Cut out scones with a biscuit cutter.
9. Brush the tops of the scones with beaten egg for shiny surfaces.
10. Bake on an ungreased cookie sheet for 10-12 minutes, or until golden brown.
